ogTitle: Marlo Merrican vs Marlowe: Climate Safety

heading: Marlo Merrican vs Marlowe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marlo Merrican, New South Wales and Marlowe, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marlowe has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Marlo Merrican (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marlo Merrican or Marlowe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marlo Merrican has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Marlowe scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marlo Merrican scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Marlowe scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marlo Merrican or Marlowe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marlowe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
